allowed_provider_queries: norgatedata.watchlist_symbols for the frozen historical watchlist names
norgatedata.database_symbols for US Equities and US Equities Delisted only to resolve active/delisted availability
norgatedata.first_quoted_date and norgatedata.last_quoted_date for membership and delisting metadata
norgatedata.price_timeseries daily adjusted OHLCV only for preselected universe-validation symbols and benchmarks
construction_steps: Resolve each symbol against US Equities and US Equities Delisted.
Discard non-common-like units, warrants, rights, and obvious derivative tickers before prices are inspected.
Apply stable hash sampling by symbol and database bucket, not alphabetical order.
Fetch adjusted daily OHLCV only for sampled symbols.
Archive the universe build if minimum panel requirements are not met.
If requirements are met, create a separate second-backtest gate before any Candidate 003 rerun.

disabled_sleeve_policy.reason: Norgate daily bars cannot reconstruct dollar bars.

fallback_watchlists: Russell 1000 + 2000 + Micro Cap Superset Current & Past
frozen_watchlists.fallback_use_policy: Use the first available fallback only if the primary watchlist is unavailable; record the reason before universe construction.
frozen_watchlists.primary_watchlist: Russell 2000 + Micro Cap Superset Current & Past

sampling_method.ordering_rule: sort by bucket, then stable hash; never by raw ticker order

trial_limitation.reason: Norgate free trial history is expected to provide roughly two years only.
